name: @fxyz/graph-engine
description: Graph-engine — the headless graph controller. Incremental ingest→diff→apply, server-positions-first layout policy, id-keyed identity/selection stores, throttled spatial-index interaction, budgeted labels, a lens runtime with incremental styling deltas, and renderers as swappable BACKENDS behind an observable-API contract (a stub backend ships in this package; an NVL adapter is wired via an injected constructor; other renderers slot in the same way). A suite of interaction-law acceptance tests ships in this package — features come after laws.
author: ƒxyz ℕetwork
